description_long: This ornate fountain features a large, vertical ceramic-tiled backdrop adorned with intricate blue and gold motifs, including a central medallion depicting a classical scene. The upper section is crowned with decorative flourishes and flanked by stylized birds and floral patterns. The basin is rectangular and projects outward, bordered by two square plinths with matching tilework. The fountain is set against a stone wall, with some greenery visible along the sides. The tiles are predominantly blue and white, with accents of gold and brown, and the overall structure appears to be made of stone and ceramic. The fountain shows signs of weathering, with mineral stains and some plant growth around the base.
description: A richly decorated, tile-clad wall fountain with a rectangular basin and classical blue-and-gold motifs, set against a stone wall with some greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full decorative tiled backdrop, central medallion, and the rectangular basin with side plinths.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the fountain's shallow depth, the protruding basin, and the thickness of the tiled wall.
description_view_2: Alternate front view, similar to view 0 but with slightly different lighting and angle, emphasizing the central medallion and basin.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness of the wall and the outward projection of the basin.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is richly decorated with hand-painted ceramic tiles featuring classical motifs, including a central medallion with a human figure scene, ornate scrollwork, stylized birds, and floral patterns. Gold and blue accents highlight the intricate baroque-style embellishments.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is rectangular, shallow, and projects outward from the wall, bordered by two square plinths with matching tilework. The rim is slightly raised and the basin appears to be a single tier with no internal divisions.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: The fountain is set against a rough stone wall with some climbing greenery and is surrounded by stone paving. No additional landscaping or benches are visible.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the fountain appears dry with mineral stains indicating previous water flow from a central spout.
